query:
SELECT 
  description,
  type,
  COUNT(*) as qtd,
  SUM(amount) as total
FROM transactions 
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
  AND description IN ('Recebido', 'Enviado', 'Depósito InfinitePay')
GROUP BY description, type
ORDER BY description;
